name: Masterworks 5: Annie Jacobs-Perkins, cello
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 🎭 Artistic Merit – Annie Jacobs-Perkins delivered Schelomo with firm tone and precise intonation in the cello solos, navigating Bloch's rhapsodic lines against the orchestra's Hebrew-inflected swells; the cello's lament in the central episode c…
